## Submission Type

- [ ] New paper entry (backlog)
- [ ] Promote existing entry to curated
- [ ] Update / correct existing entry
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Paper Info

- **Title:**
- **Domain:**
- **File Path:**

## Core Judgment

<!-- 1-2 sentence summary of your evaluation of this paper's value to the team -->

## Submitter Self-Check

- [ ] Front matter is complete (all required YAML fields filled)
- [ ] File is in the correct directory (`domains/<domain>/backlog/` or `curated/`)
- [ ] Filename follows `<year>-<short-slug>.md` convention
- [ ] Tags are from `standards/tag_system.md`
- [ ] One-line verdict is evaluative (not a copy of the abstract)
- [ ] "Hidden Assumptions & Weaknesses" contains genuine analysis
- [ ] No PDF files included in this PR
- [ ] At least 3 evidence items for curated entries

## For Reviewers

Please evaluate this entry using `standards/review_rubric.md`. Key questions:

1. Does this entry add judgment beyond the abstract?
2. Are weaknesses genuinely identified (not hand-waved)?
3. Would you change your reading priority based on this entry?

### Reviewer Conclusion

<!-- Check exactly one -->

- [ ] `merge-to-backlog` — Meets minimum quality; useful reference
- [ ] `promote-to-curated` — Excellent entry; all sections substantive
- [ ] `request-revision` — Issues identified (see comments)
- [ ] `reject` — Out of scope or unsalvageable quality
